creator: DougB@DougBarton.net
text:
root@tntpro.com wrote:
> 
> >Number:         27956
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       New port:A messenging client supporting AOL, Yahoo, MSN, and ICQ

	Thank you for your submission, however it has numerous problems. First of
all, we don't do ports of binaries except in extraordinary circumstances.
Sources for this port are freely available, so this isn't one of those.
Second, please take a good read through the porter's handbook. You want to
use tabs instead of spaces for example. 

Good luck,

Doug
-- 
    If you're never wrong, you're not trying hard enough.

         Do YOU Yahoo!?
